batch: Batch138 — P0 Hosted Proof Execution Gate
phase: P0 hosted proof execution gate before P1/P2 expansion
purpose: Provide one auditable gate that reads the real proof artifacts, classifies blockers, and prevents hosted/public proof from being claimed until Node24 CI, APP_URL strict smoke, hosted save/export smoke, real visual smoke evidence, P0/P1 stability and public rollout readiness artifacts pass.
selectedBecause: Batch137 added the evidence capture pack, but the project still needs a single execution gate that ties those artifacts to claim policy, CI output and admin/runtime boards. This is still P0/P1 stabilization, not a new teacher feature.

executionModes.description: Runs source/type/build/local smoke and writes a blocked hosted proof report when APP_URL or Node24/visual evidence is missing.
Runs on Node24 with APP_URL/GIAOAN_DEMO_URL and uploaded visual evidence. This mode can close hosted proof only if every required artifact passes.
allowedClaims: hosted evidence passed for the specific URL and artifact set
production-ready still requires separate production DB/security/legal review

hardGates.label: Node24 CI/deploy proof
hardGates.passRule: artifact.ok === true and artifact.nodeVersion major is 24

hardGates.label: APP_URL strict release smoke
hardGates.passRule: artifact.ok === true, artifact.appUrlPresent === true and artifact.summary.failed === 0

hardGates.label: Hosted real account save/export smoke
hardGates.passRule: artifact.ok === true and hosted save/export smoke marker is true

hardGates.label: Real browser visual smoke evidence
hardGates.passRule: artifact.ok === true and all required viewport captures pass; template evidence is not enough

hardGates.label: P0/P1 stability report
hardGates.passRule: artifact.ok === true, localP0Stable === true and p1FoundationSourceReady === true

hardGates.label: Batch137 hosted evidence capture board
hardGates.passRule: artifact.hostedProofClosed === true with no missing required evidence

hardGates.label: Public rollout readiness report
hardGates.passRule: artifact.ok === true and publicRolloutAllowed === true; productionReady can still be false until production review

requiredSignals: save/export controls visible or clearly gated

allowed: Batch138 adds a P0 hosted proof execution gate and report.
A local run may say the gate is blocked and list missing evidence.
Hosted proof can only be described for the exact URL/artifacts that passed.
blocked: Không nói public rollout allowed nếu public-rollout report còn false.
Không nói hosted proof closed nếu Node24/APP_URL/visual/save-export artifacts chưa pass.
Không nói visual smoke pass nếu chỉ có template.
